Nonlinear-Term Configuration for HBSAE Models

Source: R/hbm-config.R
hbm_nonlinear.Rd

Bundles the nonlinear-term arguments of hbm into a single named list. Same opt-in pattern as hbm_control.

hbm_nonlinear(terms, type = c("spline", "gp"), k = -1L, gp_scale = NULL)

Arguments

terms

Character vector of predictor names to be wrapped in s() or gp().

type

Character. "spline" (default) or "gp".

k

Integer. Spline basis dimension. Default -1L (let mgcv choose).

gp_scale

Optional numeric. GP length-scale (c argument of gp).

Value

A named list of arguments for hbm, mapping to nonlinear, nonlinear_type, spline_k, gp_scale.

See also

hbm_control, hbm_priors, hbm

Examples

nl_spline <- hbm_nonlinear(c("x1", "x3"), type = "spline", k = 5)
nl_gp     <- hbm_nonlinear(c("x2"),       type = "gp",     gp_scale = 1.5)

Contents
